army_rules.name: Voice of Command
army_rules.description: If your Army Faction is ASTRA MILITARUM , OFFICER models with this ability can issue Orders. Each OFFICER ’s datasheet will specify how many Orders it can issue in a battle round and which units are eligible to receive those Orders. Each time an Officer model issues an Order, select one of the Orders below, then select one eligible friendly unit within 6" of that Officer model to issue it to. OFFICER models can issue Orders in your Command phase and at the end of a phase in which they disembarked from a TRANSPORT or were set up on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, the unit you selected is affected by that Order. Unless otherwise stated, a unit can only be affected by one Order at a time (any Order subsequently issued to that unit replaces the current one). Orders cannot be issued to Battle-shocked units, and if a unit being affected by an Order becomes Battle-shocked, that Order ceases to affect that unit. Only ASTRA MILITARUM models gain the benefit of an Order issued to their unit. Move! Move! Move! M +3" Add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit. Fix Bayonets! WS +1 Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1. Take Aim! BS +1 Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1. First Rank, Fire! Second Rank, Fire! A +1 Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1. Take Cover! SV +1 Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1 (this cannot improve a model’s Save to better than 3+). Duty and Honour! LD +1 OC +1 Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.

rule.name: Born Soldiers
rule.description: Each time a model in a REGIMENT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time a model in a SQUADRON unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: Death Mask of Ollanius
enhancements.description: OFFICER model only. While the bearer’s unit is Battle-shocked , subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, instead of changing it to 0.

enhancements.name: Drill Commander
enhancements.description: OFFICER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, if that unit Remained Stationary this turn, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

enhancements.name: Grand Strategist
enhancements.description: OFFICER model only. In your Command phase , the bearer can issue one additional Order.

enhancements.name: Reactive Command
enhancements.description: OFFICER model only. Each time an enemy unit is set up within 9" of the bearer’s unit, the bearer can issue one Order. This is not counted towards the number of Orders the bearer can issue in a battle round .

stratagems.name: COORDINATED ACTION
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT unit from your army and one SQUADRON unit from your army within 6" of and visible to that REGIMENT unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, Orders affecting one of your units affect the other, and vice versa.
stratagems.fluff: The potency of armour and infantry is greatly enhanced when both work in close concert.

stratagems.name: REINFORCEMENTS!
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves , at its Starting Strength and with all of its wounds remaining.
stratagems.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units . You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.
stratagems.fluff: So numerous are the infantry of the Astra Militarum that fresh reserves can be called up at a moment’s notice.

stratagems.name: FLEXIBLE COMMAND
stratagems.target: Any number of ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER units from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your Officers can issue Orders to REGIMENT units and SQUADRON units.
stratagems.fluff: Some Astra Militarum officers have served with infantry and armour, and are equally adept at commanding either.

stratagems.name: FIELDS OF FIRE
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT unit and one SQUADRON unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time your selected REGIMENT and SQUADRON units make an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.fluff: Armour and infantry work in concert, forming overlapping fields of fire against which neither cover nor heavy armour can protect.

stratagems.name: INSPIRED COMMAND
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your OFFICER can issue one Order as if it were your Command phase.
stratagems.fluff: The greatest officers make their voices heard at the critical moment, their orders swift and decisive.

stratagems.name: STALWART PROTECTOR
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is allocated to an INFANTRY model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of your VEHICLE , that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
stratagems.fluff: The indefatigable tanks of the Astra Militarum serve as mobile cover for the troops marching in their shadow.

rule.name: Artillery Support
rule.description: At the start of the battle round , select one of the following types of artillery support. Creeping Barrage: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield: On a 5+, until the end of the battle round, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it. The maximum number of units that can be shaken by this rule in each battle round depends on the battle size, as shown below. Incendiary Bombardment: Select a number of enemy units more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are scattered. While a unit is scattered, it cannot have the Benefit of Cover . The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below. Smoke Shells: Select a number of units from your army. Until the end of the battle round, those units have the Stealth ability. BATTLE SIZE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF UNITS Incursion 2 Strike Force 3 Onslaught 4

enhancements.name: Eager Advance
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. While the bearer is leading a REGIMENT unit, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Flash Grenades
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Legacy Sidearm
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearers Pistols .

enhancements.name: Stalwart’s Honours
enhancements.description: OFFICER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, when that unit is issued an Order, it is also affected by the Take Cover! Order.

stratagems.name: TRENCH FIGHTERS
stratagems.when: Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if it is a REGIMENT model. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.fluff: Inured to the savage horrors of trench warfare, these warriors will fight until their last breath.

stratagems.name: OVER THE TOP
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY OFFICER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your model issues the Move! Move! Move! Order, it can issue that Order to any number of eligible friendly INFANTRY REGIMENT units, regardless of range to your model.
stratagems.fluff: The whistle blows to signal the attack. Waves of infantry emerge from cover to advance upon the foe.

stratagems.name: FLARE BURST
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit within 12", you can re-roll the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: As the infantry assault proceeds, flares are fired into the skies, illuminating opponents below.

stratagems.name: CALLOUS SACRIFICE
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, one model from your unit is destroyed after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.
stratagems.fluff: All victory requires sacrifice. The destruction of the enemy must always take priority over the preservation of lives.

stratagems.name: FURIOUS FUSILLADE
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit while targeting an enemy unit within half range.
stratagems.fluff: Whilst accuracy has its benefits, sheer weight of fire is no less effective at bringing down the foe.

stratagems.name: MINEFIELD
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit ends a Charge move within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).
stratagems.fluff: Sappers have laid down a network of mines across the battlefield. Should the enemy attempt an ill-advised assault, they will surely suffer for it.

rule.name: Armoured Fist
rule.description: Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM model from your army makes a ranged attack in a turn in which it disembarked from a TRANSPORT , add 1 to the Wound roll .

enhancements.name: Bold Leadership
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase , and the bearer’s unit (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under you control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

enhancements.name: Sacred Unguents
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER model only. At the start of your Shooting phase , select one TRANSPORT from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT and TITANIC units) within 3" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that TRANSPORT makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll .
keyword_restrictions: ASTRA MILITARUM TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER TRANSPORT AIRCRAFT
keywords_mentioned: ASTRA MILITARUM TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER TRANSPORT AIRCRAFT

enhancements.name: Smoke Grenades
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. The bearer’s unit has the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability while the bearer’s unit is wholly within 3" of one or more friendly TRANSPORT models.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Honours
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. The bearer’s unit can disembark from a TRANSPORT after it has Advanced . If it does, it counts as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

stratagems.name: VOX-RELAY
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY OFFICER unit from your army embarked within a TRANSPORT . You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it is embarked within a TRANSPORT .
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield, and it can issue Orders to ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT units from your army [excluding TITANIC units) regardless of the distance to and from your unit’s TRANSPORT .
stratagems.fluff: This armoured transport has been modified to house a tactical command suite and vox-relay, enabling embarked officers to give orders from relative safety.

stratagems.name: RAPID DISPERSAL
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your INFANTRY unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".
stratagems.fluff: Troops trained in mechanised combat disembark swiftly from their transport’s hatches, avoiding incoming fire and advancing on their objectives.

stratagems.name: CLEAR AND SECURE
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker , you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll .
stratagems.fluff: Mechanised charges rely upon shock, awe and speed to secure ground. Any enemies that block the path must be obliterated swiftly.

stratagems.name: SWIFT INTERCEPTION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move .
stratagems.target: One TRANSPORT unit from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT and TITANIC units) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagems.effect: Your TRANSPORT can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.fluff: Fast-moving armoured transports allow a commander to react quickly to enemy movements and intercept outflanking opponents.

stratagems.name: HASTY EXTRACTION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase , after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move .
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT from your army, it can embark within that TRANSPORT .
stratagems.fluff: Should the tide turn against them, mechanised forces swiftly re-embark their transports in order to reposition.

stratagems.name: MOVE OUT
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT from your army, it can embark within that TRANSPORT .
stratagems.fluff: High command’s priorities have shifted. Swift embarkation and redeployment is required.

rule.name: Iron Tread
rule.description: Each time a SQUADRON unit from your army Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it; until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit, and when making that Advance move, that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of enemy models.

enhancements.name: Calm Under Fire
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Once per turn, after the bearer issues an Order to a SQUADRON unit from your army, it can issue the same Order to another SQUADRON unit from your army.

enhancements.name: Indomitable Steed
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

enhancements.name: Regimental Banner
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Veteran Crew
enhancements.description: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

stratagems.name: FINAL HOUR
stratagems.type: Hammer of the Emperor – Epic Deed Stratagem
stratagems.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that is Below Half-strength (excluding OFFICER units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle round , ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding [ONE SHOT] weapons) have the [HAZARDOUS] ability, and each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and to the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: Even with flames licking through the interior of their vehicle, this crew refuse to abandon their positions, regardless of the risk to their lives.

stratagems.name: BLAZING ADVANCE
stratagems.type: Hammer of the Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase , just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Advances .
stratagems.target: That SQUADRON unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.fluff: By petitioning the machine spirits of their vehicles, tank crews push their armoured steeds beyond conventional limits.

stratagems.name: TACTICAL WITHDRAWAL
stratagems.type: Hammer of the Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase , just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Falls Back .
stratagems.target: That SQUADRON unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.fluff: Even in retreat, the armoured fist of the Astra Militarum keep their cannons firing.

stratagems.name: CRASH THROUGH
stratagems.type: Hammer of the Emperor – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal , Advance or Charge move , it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.
stratagems.fluff: Ruins, barricades, bunkers; few such structures can impede the grinding advance of an Astra Militarum armoured corps.

stratagems.name: FURIOUS CANNONADE
stratagems.type: Hammer of the Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.fluff: At close range, armoured vehicles open up with their full complement of weapons, dispensing the Emperor’s righteous wrath.

stratagems.name: ABLATIVE PLATING
stratagems.type: Hammer of the Emperor – Wargear Stratagem
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.fluff: Crews routinely reinforce their vehicle's armour, adding ablative plating, track links, sandbags and other means to protect the hull.

rule.name: Masters of Camouflage
rule.description: ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER and REGIMENT models from your army have the Benefit of Cover . While such a model has the Benefit of Cover for any other reason (e.g. because it is wholly within a RUIN ), improve the Save characteristic of that model by 1 (to a maximum of 3+).

enhancements.name: Guerrilla Honours
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer is on the battlefield, select up to three other ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Scare Gas Grenades
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 8" of the bearer’s unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units); that unit must take a Battle-shock test .

enhancements.name: Survival Gear
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Tripwires
enhancements.description: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. Each time an enemy INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit ends a Normal , Advance , Charge or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

stratagems.name: CRACK SHOTS
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.
stratagems.fluff: Reconnaissance units are often comprised of experienced survivalists and hunters, many of whom are expert marksmen.

stratagems.name: DRAW THEM OUT
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move .
stratagems.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.fluff: Light infantry utilise harassing fire to draw their enemies into position for an ambush.

stratagems.name: SCRAMBLE FIELD
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Reinforcements step .
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of your unit.
stratagems.fluff: This unit is equipped with a scramble field generator, a device capable of disrupting teleportation beacons and other homing technology.

stratagems.name: COURAGEOUS DIVERSION
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase .
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and each time an enemy model makes an attack, if your unit is the closest eligible target, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: These soldiers scream blood-curdling battle cries as they rush forwards, emboldening their squadmates and causing the enemy to waver.

stratagems.name: TANGLEFOOT GRENADES
stratagems.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM GRENADES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).
stratagems.fluff: Employed by skirmishers and recon troops, tanglefoot grenades ensnare advancing infantry, slowing their advance.

stratagems.name: SCOUTING OUTRIDERS
stratagems.type: Hammer of the Emperor – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED or ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER unit from your army that is wholly within 10" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves .
stratagems.fluff: Sentinels and cavalry units use their speed and mobility to outflank the foe, ready to strike at the most opportune moment.

rule.name: Only the Best
rule.description: Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model from your army makes a ranged attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Bombast-class Vox-array
enhancements.description: MILITARUM TEMPESTUS OFFICER model only. Each time the bearer issues an Order , if the bearer’s unit contains one or more models equipped with a master vox, it can issue that Order to up to three different REGIMENT units, instead of only one.

enhancements.name: Priority-drop Beacon
enhancements.description: MILITARUM TEMPESTUS OFFICER model only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase , regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Shroud Projector
enhancements.description: MILITARUM TEMPESTUS OFFICER model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Advance Augury
enhancements.description: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three REGIMENT units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves , regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: BELLICOSA DROP
stratagems.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that is in Reserves and has the Deep Strike ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge .
stratagems.fluff: Bellicosa drop protocols require intensive additional training but enable elite Imperial soldiery to land virtually on top of the enemy’s positions.

stratagems.name: FIRING HOT
stratagems.target: One MILITARUM TEMPESTUS or KASRKIN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when targeting an enemy unit within 12", improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of hot-shot lascarbines, hot-shot lasguns, hot-shot laspistols, hot-shot marksman rifles, hot-shot volley guns and sentry hot-shot volley guns equipped by models in your unit by 1.
stratagems.fluff: At the risk of permanently burning out power packs, hot-shot weaponry can be temporarily overcharged to provide additional punch at the crucial moment.

stratagems.name: FIRE AND RELOCATE
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced .
stratagems.fluff: Once deployed, it is vital that the soldiers stay on the move and keep firing, avoiding becoming bogged down and maintaining the pressure on their reeling foes.

stratagems.name: SERVO‑DESIGNATORS
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase , just after an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that is visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover .
stratagems.fluff: Released in a swarm from a modified Valkyrie gunship, high-altitude servo-skulls analyse targeting data from the ongoing fight and then provide updated firing solutions to the troops on the ground.

stratagems.name: AERIAL EXTRACTION
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, if all of its models have the Deep Strike ability, or one VALKYRIE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves .
stratagems.fluff: Such swift manoeuvres are vital to retaining command of the developing tactical situation, whether gunships are peeling off to strike at the enemy from a fresh angle or infantry being extracted by dropcraft for rapid redeployment.

stratagems.name: ON MY POSITION
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One REGIMENT INFANTRY unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds . Then, your unit suffers 3D3 mortal wounds.
stratagems.fluff: Circling Aeronautica Imperialis strike fighters wait above to launch strafing runs should the attack falter. In extremis, these assets can be called down upon Imperial positions in danger of being overrun, affording soldiers the desperate dignity of taking their enemies with them into death.

rule.name: Ruthless Discipline
rule.description: Add 1 to the number of Orders each ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER model from your army can issue, as stated on their datasheet . While an ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army is affected by an Order, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

stratagems.name: BRUTAL TRAINING
stratagems.type: Tempestus Boarding Regiment – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.target: One MILITARUM TEMPESTUS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.
stratagems.fluff: Tempestus Scions are trained in a range of specialist hand-to-hand combat techniques. Coupled with combat stimms, these make them bruising foes.

stratagems.name: COORDINATED STRIKE
stratagems.type: Tempestus Boarding Regiment – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.target: One OFFICER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Order your model can issue. Every ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army is issued that Order (regardless of any keywords those units are normally required to have).
stratagems.restrictions: Until the end of the turn, OFFICER models from your army cannot issue Orders . You can only use this Stratagem once.
stratagems.fluff: Employing coordinated helm chronos, the Scions execute a pre-arranged simultaneous tactical manoeuvre.

stratagems.name: LOCKDOWN
stratagems.type: Tempestus Boarding Regiment – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, after your unit ends a move, you can select one open Hatchway it moved through during that move; close that Hatchway.
stratagems.fluff: Voidborne Scions are trained to swiftly goad the machine spirits of bulkheads and hatches, slamming them shut in their wake to trap the foe.

stratagems.name: FIRE-PATTERN HURRICANUS
stratagems.type: Tempestus Boarding Regiment – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase , just after a MILITARUM TEMPESTUS unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That MILITARUM TEMPESTUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, subtract 2 from the Move characteristic of models in that enemy unit, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.
stratagems.fluff: Emptying the magazines of their weapons in an indiscriminate hail of fire, the Scions create a zone of lethality that foes will struggle to advance into.

stratagems.name: INSPIRED COMMAND
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your OFFICER can issue one Order as if it were your Command phase.
stratagems.fluff: The greatest officers make their voices heard at the critical moment, their orders swift and decisive.
keywords_mentioned: ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER
target_keywords: ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER

stratagems.name: SNAP TO IT
stratagems.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s OFFICER model can issue 1 Order as if it were your Command phase .
stratagems.fluff: Reading the flow of battle and reacting in accordance, this officer expects their barked orders to be followed post-haste.
keywords_mentioned: ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER
target_keywords: ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER

stratagems.name: REINFORCEMENTS!
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves , at its Starting Strength and with all of its wounds remaining.
stratagems.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units . You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.
stratagems.fluff: So numerous are the infantry of the Astra Militarum that fresh reserves can be called up at a moment’s notice.

stratagems.name: FIRE OVERWATCH
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement or Charge phase , just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move , or declares a charge .
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase .
stratagems.effect: If that enemy unit is visible to your unit, your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target a TITANIC unit with this Stratagem. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit, irrespective of the attacking weapon’s Ballistic Skill or any modifiers. You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.
stratagems.fluff: A hail of wildfire can drive back advancing foes.

stratagems.name: INSANE BRAVERY
stratagems.when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase , just before you take a Battle-shock test for a unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit automatically passes that Battle-shock test.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.
stratagems.fluff: Indifferent to their own survival, these warriors hold their ground against seemingly impossible odds.

stratagems.name: HEROIC INTERVENTION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move .
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only select a VEHICLE unit from your army if it is a WALKER . Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.
stratagems.fluff: Voices raised in furious war cries, your warriors surge forth to meet the enemy’s onslaught head-on.
